steps.title: Treat x plus 5 as a block
steps.content: Both sides contain $x+5$: $$6(x+5)=5(x+5)+31$$ Subtract $5(x+5)$ from both sides.

steps.title: Solve for the requested expression
steps.content: $$x+5=31$$ The problem asks for $x+5$, so no extra subtraction is needed.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C (‘$31$’) is $31$, so it is correct. Choice B, $26$, is the value of $x$, not the requested value $x+5$.
